text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing some errands with Mejiro Bright,
we return to the academy and bump into...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh! Greetings, Fukukitaru. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...That's quite a large box you have there.
Whatever could it be for?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! A fine question! Within this box resides a
miracle-working object most divine—a jumbo
lucky cat figurine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today's breakfast natto fortune foretold that
"luck would be found in the east." Thus, I
ventured eastward.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
When, lo and behold, an extraordinary aura
beckoned me into a flea market! And its origin
was none other than this lucky cat figurine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now, if you'll excuse me, I must buff this cat until
it shines like the morning sun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh, just a little more aaand... Oh, oh, oh
nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shoop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru stumbles. The box flies out of
her hands and lands on the road.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VROOOOM! Bump, bump, bump, bump...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
BY THE HEAVENS! My poor lucky cat is now a
pile of unlucky roadkill!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, dear me... Trainer, let's lend our assistance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cat is now an unrecognizable pile of debris.
We gather up its pieces and take them back to
my office, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... My lucky cat figurine has been reduced to
kindling...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what are we to do?! Without immediate
action, grave misfortune is sure to befall us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pardon me, but if I may make a suggestion...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps we could reassemble the lucky cat by
piecing it back together?
choice_data_list: That's a lot easier said than done...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer's right, Bright! If the pieces were
larger, it'd be another story! But we're working
with fragments here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It might take some time, but I imagine we could
restore it to its former glory. We should have all
the pieces here, after all.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... You're too kind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! A friend in need is a friend indeed, after
all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we set to work on reconstructing the
lucky cat figure...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Night falls, but we're nowhere near finished.
choice_data_list: We might have to work through the night...
We might have to work through the night...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nnngh... I'm starting to feel dizzy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Bright, enough is enough... I shall inform the great
Shiraoki of what's transpired, pray for
forgiveness, and request that any evil spirits be
exorcised...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Please, allow me to keep going for a little while
longer... I've finally gotten used to the process.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Slow and steady gets the job done, after all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the same energy she had when we started,
Mejiro Bright continues fitting the pieces
together without saying a word. Until...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Nghwaaa? When did I fall asleep?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My stars?! The sun has begun its ascent toward
the heavens! Morning is upon us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Fukukitaru, please take a look.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... WHOOOAAA?! C-can it be?! My lucky
cat, restored to its former glory?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Bright, don't tell me you worked through the
night without so much as a wink of sleep?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I did, but I was so focused on the task that I
hardly noticed the time. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright has successfully finished the
painstakingly intricate project in a single night...
choice_data_list: You didn't even look like you were struggling...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Talent? I wonder... I am quite adept at taking
things one step at a time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru, should any of your other items
happen to take a tumble, please don't hesitate to
get in touch. ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Heaven forbid! Bright, I vow to take extra care in
all that I do, so as not to trouble you further!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the incident proves to be a fine display of
Mejiro Bright's incredible tenacity.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was having terrific fun! It was no different
from solving a puzzle. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If you come across any other projects like this
one, please let me know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Firstly, though, I think I might ask around the
academy to see if anyone has anything to offer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm struck by visions of Mejiro Bright's training
time rapidly vanishing, so I gently dissuade her
from this new endeavor...
